text: I feel myself becoming attuned to the quiet hum of this modern space as I focus on my breath. The glass walls and angled architecture invite a sense of reflection and promise of discovery. I am calm and curious here, aware of how inhaling and exhaling settles my mind amidst the structural clarity, the stark colors, and the subtle light. I sense I am on the threshold of something thoughtful and new, tethered by my breath in each moment.
